_comment: Per-target Glide settings consumed by examples/scoring/glide_batch.py. `binding_site` points at a Glide .in file (repo-root-relative) whose GRIDFILE line names the grid .zip. These are example grids for public benchmark pockets; replace them with your own grid for production work. Protocol matches the internal reference runs: Glide HTVS / OPLS_2005 / 1 pose / LigPrep+Epik at pH 7.4. Raw GlideScore column is r_i_docking_score (minimize).
